title: fKiZanthene Whoopee Cushion 4-Pack, Classic Fart Prank Toys for Kids & Adults, Assorted Colours for Parties, Pranks & Laughter
features: Instant Laughter Maker: These whoopee cushions create realistic fart sounds when sat on, perfect for surprising family and friends. The 4-pack lets you set up multiple pranks at parties or gatherings.
Durable Rubber Construction: Made from thick, stretch-resistant rubber, these cushions withstand repeated use without bursting. Ideal for long-lasting prank fun with no need for constant replacement.
Easy Inflation & Setup: Simply blow up the cushion using the included straw, place under a seat, and wait for the comedic moment. Lightweight design fits easily in pockets or party bags.
Vibrant Assorted Colours: The set includes 4 bright colours (red, blue, green, yellow), adding a playful touch to pranks. Hide them on sofas, chairs, or car seats for unexpected giggles.
Versatile Prank Accessory: Suitable for kids’ birthday parties, April Fool’s Day, office pranks, or family gatherings. A timeless gag gift that brings laughter to all ages.
description: Product description Technical Parameters: This 4-pack of whoopee cushions comes in assorted colours, each measuring approximately 12cm x 9cm. Made from durable rubber, they are reusable and easy to inflate, providing endless prank opportunities. Key Selling Points: The fKiZanthene whoopee cushions offer a classic prank experience with realistic sound effects. The thick rubber material ensures they withstand multiple uses, while the easy inflation process makes them accessible for quick pranks. The vibrant colour assortment adds a fun visual element to any prank setup. Usage Scenarios: Perfect for surprising friends at birthday parties, livening up family gatherings, or adding humour to office breaks. These cushions are ideal for kids and adults alike, making them a versatile choice for prank enthusiasts. Use them on chairs, sofas, or any seating area to create spontaneous laughter and memorable moments. Safety Warning For external use only.
